scenarios.description: child(0) on element with no child nodes throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (childNodeSize==0)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); // childNodes list is empty
pseudocode: TEST TC01 child on empty children

scenarios.description: child(0) returns the single child Element when exactly one Element child exists (loop iterates once)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("ul"); Element li = new Element("li"); parent.appendChild(li);
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the same instance as li

scenarios.description: child(1) on element with two children (one TextNode and one Element) returns second child Element (loop iterates twice filtering)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendText("text"); Element span = new Element("span"); parent.appendChild(span);
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the same instance as span
pseudocode: TEST TC03 child after filtering non-elements

scenarios.description: child(-1) on element with one Element child throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (negative index out of range)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("p"); Element c = new Element("b"); parent.appendChild(c);

scenarios.description: child(2) on element with three non-Element nodes throws IndexOutOfBoundsException after loop filters out all nodes (loop iterates N)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendText("a"); parent.appendText("b"); parent.appendText("c");
pseudocode: TEST TC05 child with no element children
